title: ‘Digging nuclear dust sites will be a difficult process’: Trump says Iran's N-sites 'obliterated'
summary_full: Former President Trump stated that recovering uranium from Iran will be a protracted and challenging endeavor following US strikes on Tehran's nuclear sites. He asserted that "Operation Midnight Hammer" completely destroyed these facilities, making retrieval difficult.
